use_cases: Display loading state while fetching data from API or database
Show progress indication during async operations and page transitions
Visual feedback for lazy-loaded content or images
Loading indicator for media-heavy applications and entertainment platforms
Placeholder animation during file uploads or processing
ai_summary: A lava lamp-style loading animation featuring multiple colorful gradient bubbles that float up and down in continuous loop within a dark rounded container. The animation uses CSS keyframes with varying durations and delays to create organic, flowing motion. Each bubble has its own gradient color scheme (pink, green, purple, blue) creating a visually engaging alternative to traditional spinners.
